title: London Explorer
author: Unknown
description: A free interactive guide to London and its history, featuring over 100 famous, quirky and vanished locations.

title: London Travel Guide with Map
author: Etips
description: A travel guide with interactive zoomable offline maps of London, showing attractions, public bus stops, and more.

title: London Official City Guide App
author: Visit London
description: The official city guide app for London, with offline maps and guides.

title: Delay Repay
author: Unknown
description: A London commuter app that tracks eligible journeys and logs them for easy delay repayment.

title: TfL Design Projects
author: Transport for London
description: A collection of design projects for Transport for London, including photos, videos, logos, and branding.

title: Aldwych - 'Creative Playground'
author: Transport for London
description: A creative playground project by Transport for London, featuring a winning video from a competition.

title: London Data Week 2025
author: Greater London Authority
description: A citywide festival of data, featuring free events, interactive workshops, discussions, and fun activities.

title: Data for London Library
author: Greater London Authority
description: A library where users can search city data, all in one place.
